caption: 🌙 The lecture hall was empty, save for the hum of the projector and the sound of my own breathing... 🎒 I adjusted the silk blouse that felt far too thin for this 11 PM meeting, feeling the fabric cling to my curves as I turned to greet the student who stayed behind late. He was late for class, I was early for the party, and our eyes met in a charged silence... 💋 The scent of old paper and my vanilla perfume filled the room as I leaned forward over the desk, the hem of my pencil skirt riding up slightly... 👠 My French heritage meant elegance was expected, but my body language said otherwise. I let my voice drop an octave, whispering over the edge of my desk about the final assignment, watching his pupils dilate as I traced the edge of a file folder. The air felt thick, heavy with electricity... 📚 My heels clicked softly against the hardwood as I stood up, the tight material of my skirt accentuating every movement... 🖤 I walked over to the bookshelf, my silhouette framed by the dim hallway light, creating a perfect shadow play across the room. He watched, mesmerized, while I opened the drawer for his pass, the metallic click echoing in the quiet... 🗝️ This wasn't just a tutoring session anymore; it was a dance of power and desire, both of us knowing exactly where we were going. I turned to face him, the silk blouse hugging my chest as I smiled with knowing intent... 👁️ The night was young, the university quiet, and I felt invincible in my skin and my power. He took a breath, then the other, and I knew the rules of our game had just changed... 🎭
